target_skill.name: delegate-adversarial
target_skill.description: Opus sub-agent for solo flaw-finding — adversarial review, security audit, "tear this apart", architecture critique. Not for standard review (→ delegate-analytical) or panel (→ review-panel).

competing_skills.name: delegate-analytical
competing_skills.description: Sonnet sub-agent for solo judgment — review, compare, rank, evaluate. Use proactively. Not for flaw-finding (→ delegate-adversarial), rote (→ delegate-mechanical), or panel (→ review-panel).

competing_skills.name: delegate-mechanical
competing_skills.description: Haiku sub-agent for rote bulk work — summarize, extract, scaffold, compress, filter by tag/keyword, scan. Use proactively. Not for judgment (→ delegate-analytical) or async (→ fire-routine).

competing_skills.name: review-panel
competing_skills.description: Multi-agent review — "panel review", "Gemini review", "full review", "calibrate scores", "audit my vault". Auto-runs as build Phase 7. Not solo (→ delegate-analytical/adversarial).

competing_skills.name: systematic-debug
competing_skills.description: Fix bugs systematically — "X is broken", "isn't working", "fix didn't work", "still failing", "why is X happening". Not for features (→ build) or architecture (→ architect).

positive_cases: Tear this architecture apart — I want every flaw, every failure mode
Adversarial review of the auth flow before I ship
Security audit this serverless function end to end
Critique this skill design — where would it break under load?
negative_cases: Compare these three drafts and rank them by clarity (expect delegate-analytical)
Run a full panel review on the new build before push (expect review-panel)
The /api/cache endpoint is returning 500s on every other call — fix it (expect systematic-debug)
Extract every URL from this API response (expect delegate-mechanical)
Review this draft pitch for clarity and impact (expect delegate-analytical)
